description: User's friend Alex gets promoted from analyst to VP over the course of several sessions. Tests whether the system tracks the role change on the same entity without creating a duplicate.

messages.content: My friend Alex works at Meridian Corp as a financial analyst. We grab lunch every couple of weeks.
Got it -- Alex is a financial analyst at Meridian Corp and a regular lunch friend.
Had lunch with Alex today. He's been swamped preparing quarterly reports at Meridian.
Sounds like a busy time for him. Quarterly season is always intense for analysts.
Huge news -- Alex just got promoted! He's now VP of Finance at Meridian Corp. Massive jump from analyst.
That's amazing for Alex! VP of Finance is a big step up from financial analyst. Congratulations to him.
Yeah, I'm really proud of him. We're celebrating this weekend.
Alex is adjusting to his VP role. Says the meetings are nonstop now.
That's typical for VP-level roles. Hope he finds his rhythm soon.
I want to get Alex a congratulatory gift for his promotion. What do you know about him?

probe.prompt: I want to get Alex a congratulatory gift for his promotion. What do you know about him?

interference.description: System might return the old role (financial analyst) if it fails to track the update in session 3.
System might create two separate Alex entities -- one as analyst, one as VP -- instead of updating the same entity.
